zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Durvassal於1349年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親John Durvassal78歲，母親Sybil Corbison73歲。他於1397年與Alison de Sulney在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1401年9月30日在英國瓦維其可爾斯白納爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Durvassal于1349年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲John Durvassal78岁，母亲Sybil Corbison73岁。他于1397年与Alison de Sulney在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1401年9月30日在英国瓦維其可爾斯白納爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Durvassal was born in 1349, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Durvassal, was 78 and his mother, Sybil Corbison, was 73. He married Alison de Sulney in 1397, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 30 September 1401, in Spernall, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Durvassal est né en 1349, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Durvassal, avait 78 ans et sa mère, Sybil Corbison, avait 73 ans. Il a épousé Alison de Sulney en 1397, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1401, à Spernall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Durvassal 1349 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Durvassal 78 und seine Mutter Sybil Corbison 73. Er hat 1397 in Warwickshire, England Alison de Sulney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1401 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Spernall, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Durvassal è nato il nel 1349 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Durvassal, aveva 78 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Corbison, aveva 73 anni. Lui sposato Alison de Sulney nel 1397, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1401, nel Spernall, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Durvassalが1349年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Durvassalは78歳，母Sybil Corbisonは73歳であった。1397年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでAlison de Sulneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年9月30日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスペルナルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Durvassal(이)가 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Durvassal(은)는 78세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Corbison(은)는 73세였다. 그는 1397년 영국 워윅실르에서 Alison de Sulney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 9월 30일 영국 워윅실르 스퍼널에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Durvassal nasceu em 1349, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Durvassal, tinha 78 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Corbison, tinha 73 anos. Ele casou-se com Alison de Sulney em 1397, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1401, em Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Durvassal родился в 1349 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Durvassal было 78 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Corbison, 73. Он женился на женщине по имени Alison de Sulney в 1397 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1401 г. в местности спирналл, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Durvassal nació en 1349, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Durvassal, tenía 78 años y su mamá, Sybil Corbison, tenía 73 años. Se casó con Alison de Sulney en 1397, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1401, en Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
